wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets were hit despite the regime being correctly identified as trending_down and both setups being regime-aligned SHORT trades.
losses_analysis: The SL hit was likely on BAJFINANCE (carried from a prior day), which had an unrealized loss and tight stop of ~₹8.29 on a ₹888 entry. The stop was too tight relative to intraday volatility — a -0.8% Nifty day likely caused whipsaw before continuation. With only 2 fresh setups found and one not even triggering (ITC), the system is overly selective yet still losing on the trades it takes.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime was correctly identified and the system filtered for SHORT-only setups which is appropriate. However, it hurt execution: TATASTEEL's pending order never filled (price didn't reach ₹207.37), and the carried BAJFINANCE position got stopped out despite the favorable regime — suggesting entry/SL calibration issues rather than directional issues.

improvements.action: Widen SL for SELL trades to at least 1.2x ATR(14) instead of fixed tight stops — BAJFINANCE had only 0.93% SL width which is too tight for a stock with typical 1.5% daily range
improvements.reason: BAJFINANCE was stopped out at ₹896.29 (0.93% from entry) in a favorable down-trending regime, suggesting premature stop-out before the move could develop

improvements.action: For pending SELL orders, set limit entry 0.1-0.2% above the supply zone midpoint rather than at exact zone level to increase fill probability
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL SELL at ₹207.37 never triggered despite a down day — the entry was too precise and missed a potential winning trade in a 72% probability setup

improvements.action: When only 2 setups are found in a strong regime, lower the entry precision threshold rather than missing trades entirely — consider market orders within 0.3% of zone for top-ranked setups scoring >50/60
improvements.reason: Only 2 setups identified, one never triggered, one wasn't placed — net result was zero new exposure in a correctly identified trending regime

improvements.action: Do not carry SHORT positions from prior days if the stock has already moved >1.5% in favor — trail stop to breakeven or lock in partial profit to avoid giving back gains
improvements.reason: BAJFINANCE was an open position that ended in a ₹997.56 loss; a trailing mechanism would have either locked profit or reduced loss size

improvements.action: Skip re-attempt setups (like ITC rank 2 with 55% probability and sideways trend alignment) — require minimum 65% AI probability for any order placement
improvements.reason: ITC was flagged as weaker trend alignment (sideways) and scored only 46/60 with 55% probability, correctly not placed, but formalizing this threshold prevents future mistakes

tomorrow_focus: If downtrend continues (ADX >25, Nifty red), prioritize fresh supply zone SHORTs with >65% probability and use slightly aggressive entries (0.1-0.2% above zone) to ensure fills on high-conviction setups like TATASTEEL.

symbol_notes.TATASTEEL: Scored 53/60 with 72% probability but never filled — if still at supply zone tomorrow, use market order or aggressive limit; this is a high-quality setup that should not be missed twice
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE: Stop loss hit despite correct direction — if re-entering, widen SL to ₹10-12 range (1.2-1.4%) and trail once ₹10 in profit
symbol_notes.ITC: Sideways trend alignment in a trending market is a mismatch — avoid unless it clearly breaks down and aligns with regime
